tags.norm:macro-csr: The mstatus register controls the SUM field.
tags.norm:macro-csr-field: Bits mip.MEIP and mie.MEIE are interrupt bits.
tags.norm:macro-instruction: When TW=0, the WFI instruction may execute.
tags.norm:macro-extension: If the Sscofpmf extension is implemented, LCOFIP is writable.
tags.norm:macro-range: Registers f0–f31 and bits 31--1 are reserved.
tags.norm:macro-alt-csr-field: When TM is clear, access is denied.
